'''tahocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyang|kyang]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyang|kyang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tahocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæhecheth|tæhecheth]] || [[word:tæhechej|tæhechej]] || [[word:tæhechesh|tæhechesh]] || [[word:tæheche|tæheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tahohochoth|tahohochoth]] || [[word:tahohochoj|tahohochoj]] || [[word:tahohochosh|tahohochosh]] || [[word:tahohocho|tahohocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tahochoth|tahochoth]] || [[word:tahochoj|tahochoj]] || [[word:tahochosh|tahochosh]] || [[word:tahocho|tahocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tahofchoth|tahofchoth]] || [[word:tahofchoj|tahofchoj]] || [[word:tahofchosh|tahofchosh]] || [[word:tahofchof|tahofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tahochotho|tahochotho]] || [[word:tahochojo|tahochojo]] || [[word:tahochosho|tahochosho]] || [[word:tahochoko|tahochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tahochoth|tahochoth]] || [[word:tahochoj|tahochoj]] || [[word:tahochosh|tahochosh]] || [[word:tahocho|tahocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tahochothol|tahochothol]] || [[word:tahochojol|tahochojol]] || [[word:tahochoshol|tahochoshol]] || [[word:tahochokol|tahochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tahochothotho|tahochothotho]] || [[word:tahochojojo|tahochojojo]] || [[word:tahochoshosho|tahochoshosho]] || [[word:tahochoko|tahochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tahochothon|tahochothon]] || [[word:tahochojon|tahochojon]] || [[word:tahochoshon|tahochoshon]] || [[word:tahochokon|tahochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tahochothoro|tahochothoro]] || [[word:tahochojoro|tahochojoro]] || [[word:tahochoshoro|tahochoshoro]] || [[word:tahochokoro|tahochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
